summary: This Excel file contains cleaned training data for the KeepMeCompany Talker AI agent fine-tuning process. It details conversation archetypes, including goals, history, inputs, and outputs with explanations of the AI's decision logic. The data illustrates how the agent handles user interactions like subscription checks and goal transitions.
